notes: Fix: 'Check for Updates' could report 'up to date' even when a new version was live, on machines hitting a stale Fastly CDN edge for raw.githubusercontent.com (the ?ts= cache-bust from 0.2.1 only busts URLSession's local cache, not the CDN's). Updater now hits the GitHub Releases API as primary — no CDN cache, always current — with the raw manifest as fallback when rate-limited. install.sh uses the same dual-source strategy.
